meta.name: description
meta.content: Get exclusive viral digital assets, POD templates, and TikTok creator resources from Mohameden 351. Level up your edits with our premium goat and cat designs.

div.h1: Level Up Your Edits With Viral Goat Assets
div.p: Exclusive digital art, high-converting POD templates, and premium assets tailored for creators who want to stand out. Get the exact resources used in top viral TikToks.
Unlock the exact files used to create million-view masterpieces. Instant delivery, full commercial rights.
High-resolution, ultra-detailed digital art perfect for tech enthusiasts and creators. Includes raw files.
RAW 4K CLIPS – PERFECT FOR DOCS & MEMES. Instant download on Gumroad.
Exclusive, adorable 3D digital artwork featuring a cute kitty and a goat. Perfect for animal lovers.
Join the community and see why @mohameden351 assets are consistently generating viral moments across TikTok.
@mohameden351
Viral Goat Edit 🐐🔥
@mohameden351
Tech Cat Process 💻
Drop your email to get free digital wallpapers, early access to new POD assets, and a weekly dose of animal-tech madness.
No spam. Just quality content. Unsubscribe anytime.

section.style: display: none; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 10;

div.p: Have questions or want to collaborate? Reach out and let's create something amazing together.

div.style: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; max-width: 56rem; margin: 0 auto;

div.p: Email: hello@mohameden351.com
TikTok: @mohameden351
For business inquiries and partnerships, feel free to reach out directly.

section.style: display: none; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 10;

div.style: width: 12rem; height: 12rem; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; border: 4px solid rgba(34,197,94,0.5); margin: 0 auto 2rem; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(34,197,94,0.3);

h1.style: font-size: 3rem; font-weight: 800; background: linear-gradient(to right, #22c55e, #d97706); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; margin-bottom: 1rem;

p.style: font-size: 1.25rem; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: 2rem; max-width: 32rem; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;

div.p: Content Creator | Digital Artist | TikTok Viral Assets Specialist

I'm a digital artist and content creator passionate about creating viral, high-quality assets for creators worldwide. With over 500k followers and 10M+ views, I specialize in goat and tech-themed digital content.
My mission is to empower creators with premium, affordable digital assets they can use to create viral content and stand out in their niche.
When I'm not creating, you'll find me exploring new design trends, collaborating with other creators, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible in digital art.

section.style: display: none; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 10;

div.p: All premium digital assets, ready to transform your creative projects.
High-resolution digital art for tech enthusiasts.
RAW 4K CLIPS – PERFECT FOR DOCS & MEMES.
Adorable 3D digital artwork for all occasions.

section.style: display: none; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 10;

div.p: High-converting POD designs ready for your store. Use on Merch by Amazon, Printful, Redbubble, and more.
Perfect for Merch by Amazon and Printful stores.
Premium design for all POD platforms.

section.style: display: none; padding: 6rem 1.5rem; position: relative; z-index: 10;

div.p: Learn the secrets behind viral TikTok content and how to use our assets effectively.
Learn how to use our goat and tech assets to create jaw-dropping edits that go viral. We cover transitions, effects, timing, and more.
Discover which trending sounds work best with our assets and how to synchronize them perfectly for maximum engagement.
Turn your viral TikToks into revenue using our assets. Learn about TikTok Creator Fund, brand deals, and more.
The premier destination for viral animal-tech digital assets. Quality tools for quality creators.
Someone from USA
Just purchased Goat Assets
Welcome to Mohameden 351. By accessing our website and purchasing our digital assets, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

You may use this website for browsing, purchasing digital assets, and accessing content. You must not use this website in any way that causes, or may cause, damage to the website or impairment of the availability or accessibility of the website.

All products sold on this website are digital downloads (e.g., POD designs, sticker packs, social media assets, digital art). Upon successful payment, you will receive an instant download link. No physical shipping is involved.

We accept various forms of payment through our secure third-party processors. All prices are subject to change without notice. By submitting payment, you represent that you are authorized to use the designated payment method.

Due to the nature of digital downloads, all sales are final. We do not offer refunds, returns, or exchanges once a file has been purchased and downloaded, unless there is a proven technical defect with the file itself.

You agree not to use our products for illegal activities. You may not distribute, resell, or share the raw source files of any digital asset purchased from Mohameden 351 without an appropriate license.

All content, designs, and digital assets on this website are the exclusive property of Mohameden 351 and are protected by copyright laws. Purchasing an asset grants you a license to use it, not ownership of the copyright.

Mohameden 351 shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your access to or use of, or inability to access or use, the website or digital products.
We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of any changes by updating the date at the top of this page.
If you have any questions about these Terms, please reach out via our Contact page.
We collect information you provide directly to us when you make a purchase, sign up for our newsletter, or contact us. This may include your name, email address, and transaction history.

If you opt into our newsletter, we store your email address to send you weekly updates, free digital wallpapers, and early access to POD assets. You can unsubscribe at any time using the link at the bottom of our emails.
All payment information is handled securely by third-party processors (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Gumroad). We do not store or process your credit card numbers on our servers.

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to analyze website traffic and improve user experience. This helps us understand which digital assets are most popular and how visitors navigate our site.

Your data is used solely to process orders, deliver your digital downloads, provide customer support, and, with your consent, send promotional emails. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. However, no transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.

We may share your data with trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or servicing you, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.
You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Please contact us to exercise these rights.
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please use the Contact page to reach us.

This license allows you to use the purchased digital assets for personal, non-commercial projects. You may use them for your own personal social media accounts, home printing, or personal creative projects where no money is being made.

Our commercial use license allows you to use the assets to generate revenue. This includes incorporating the designs into products for sale, using them in monetized videos, or client work. A commercial license must be specifically purchased or noted on the product page.

ul.li: Creating physical products (T-shirts, mugs, posters) using Print-on-Demand (POD) services (with Commercial License).
Using video clips and assets in monetized TikToks, YouTube shorts, or Instagram Reels.
Modifying the designs or combining them with other elements to create a new derivative work.
Reselling, sharing, or distributing the raw, original digital files as-is.
Selling the designs on stock image websites or as digital design bundles.
Claiming the original artwork or assets as your own.

div.p: You may use our POD Assets on platforms like Printify, Printful, Redbubble, or Merch by Amazon provided you have a Commercial License. However, you cannot upload the raw, unmodified design files to platforms where the platform claims copyright over uploaded designs.

Using our viral assets in your videos is highly encouraged! For personal accounts, a Personal License is sufficient. For brand accounts or heavily monetized channels, a Commercial License is required.
Purchasing a license does not transfer copyright ownership. Mohameden 351 retains all copyrights to the original digital files and artwork.
If you originally purchased a Personal License and your project has grown to be commercial, you can upgrade your license by paying the difference. Please contact us to arrange this.
If you are a large corporation or need an enterprise-level extended license, please use our Contact page to reach out.
